title_original: IonQ | IonQ Achieves $130.0 Million of GAAP Revenues, Beating Guidance by 20%
summary_original: IonQ reported $130 million in annual revenue for 2025, representing 202% year-over-year growth and surpassing its guidance by 20%. This marks the first time a public quantum company has achieved over $100 million in annual revenue. Key milestones include an expanded $60 million agreement with QuantumBasel, the sale of a fifth-generation, 100-qubit system to the Korea Institute of Science and Technology Information, and an agreement to acquire SkyWater Technology to enhance U.S. quantum supply capability. Over 60% of revenue came from commercial customers, while international sales accounted for more than 30%. IonQ projects 2026 revenue between $225 million and $245 million and emphasizes continued organic and commercial growth.
